name: Health & Wellness
tagline: Strong members build strong communities — investing in the whole man.
overview: The Health & Wellness committee champions the physical, mental, and financial well-being of E100 members and the broader Atlanta community. Through Laughing Matters, the Men's Health Brunch, Financial Health events, and Physical Fitness programming, H&W creates free, accessible experiences that meet people where they are. We cannot fix anyone — but we can ensure they have access.
